entry.title: Turn This Manor into a Home!
entry.summary:
Author: jerrys_21_sided_die

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,032Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 21

Summary: For as long as Bruce can (or chooses) to remember, Wayne Manor has been empty. After Alfred gets fed up with his macho “I’m Batman I don’t need anyone but the night.” attitude he sends Bruce to Haly’s circus to unwind; but thats not what happens, Bruce watches two performers fall to their deaths as their 7 year old son watches. Bruce decides right there and then he won’t let Richard become one of the children lost to Gothams foster care system. Along the way a reporter from the Daily Planet catches wind of this ordeal, as he interviews Richard (with the help of Bruce) he starts to linger more and more around Wayne Manor. As introverted as Bruce is, he likes the reporters company, Richard’s little feet pattering around the manor, and the dinner outings the trio go on every Friday. They make this house (or mansion) a home.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Cage of Roses
entry.summary:
Author: endofer

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,859Chapters: 4/14Kudos: 46

Summary: The story Clark had heard wasn't entirely clear and previous monster hunters who'd come investigating had been sent packing, unwilling to talk about it. Some details remained the same between retellings: there was a monstrous creature in this town, it punished crime and protected the town from invasion, and it occasionally asked for a human sacrifice.In a castle overlooking a town lives a monstrous bat creature. It is the town’s protector and a source of fear. Clark Kent hears about these rumours and comes to investigate. A retelling Beauty and the Beast with MonsterHunter!Clark and Beast!Bruce ft. Alfred and a handful of batkids.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 134,872Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 680

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: free fall
entry.summary:
Author: sulky_croissant

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,501Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: “Already?” Clark asked, half-distracted. His eyes were on Bruce’s mouth. “Mm,” Bruce tugged lightly on Clark’s curls. “Unfortunately, we have League business.” “Ah,” The deflation was immediate, but Clark just closed his eyes, took a deep breath that only shuddered a little, and started to push up, already squaring his shoulders. “How long?” Or: Emergency League business interrupts aftercare. That won't be a problem, surely.

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,634Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 73

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 129,577Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 74

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.   i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,568Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 166

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: good things come in threes
entry.summary:
Author: elysianprince

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,763Chapters: 4/17Kudos: 64

Summary: "So, what do you say? Just you and me on this one. Like old times?" There was a glimmer of hope in those inhumanly blue eyes of Kent's as he waited for Batman to answer. Bruce couldn't help but think how ridiculous it was to refer to something that happened once or twice in the past year or so as 'old times,' but Superman had been frustratingly overly-familiar the last few times they had spoken, and it seemed that wasn't something distance had changed. Bruce decided to humor him.Bruce is trying to find the balance between his responsibility for Dick and his partnership with Robin. Clark is trying to navigate catching feelings at the office again, so to speak. Dick just wants to be taken seriously, and maybe for Batman and Superman to stop being so clueless about each other. Somehow, the crime ring trafficking alien creatures in their two cities might just be the answer they've all been looking for.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,675Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 818

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: The loser has to fall.
entry.summary:
Author: ShaipB

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,775Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 20

Summary: "Are you enjoying this moment?" Clark's voice sounded... odd for a moment, out of sync. He hadn't been sleeping well; with the patrols and the Riddler on the loose, sleep was hard to come by. Bruce just wanted to protect his boys. He wanted to believe they were safe, that asleep in their beds they were far from the dangers of Gotham. But waking up was always cold, and reality showed no mercy.

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,622Chapters: 22/30Kudos: 695

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: two thousand years and twenty more
entry.summary:
Author: A_Lady_of_Night

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,310Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 17

Summary: When the mysterious disappearances of Greek artefacts from The Gotham Museum might spread to The Metropolis Museum of Art and History as well, Bruce and Clark plan to investigate at the new exhibit opening the next day. Unfortunately, their plans get derailed and stopping a possible small-time burglary expedition spirals into disaster. Or: Superman loses his powers and gets turned into a merman. No one is happy about this.

entry.title: What it takes to fall in love
entry.summary:
Author: Error404FileNotFound

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 444Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: A slowburn between Batman and Superman. This writer knows the DC universe but is going rogue and will not be researching. This is based off (slightly) Rob Pattison Batman (2022) and the David Corenswett Superman (2025). Also a bunch of cartoons I found on pintrest that were very gay. I'm also very sorry but english is my first langauge and nothing bad is currently happening in my life so it won't be as peak. 19-year old Batman adopts young Dick Grayson and both struggle to learn to be part of each others life. Superman is dealing with a growing crush on Lex Luthor, but Lex may have ulterior motives. Both are little shits that are falling in love and don't realise it. (My grammer is lowk shit, but who freaking cares you chose to look for gay superman batman stuff, what did you expect?)

entry.title: Don't Look Back
entry.summary:
Author: lovelytime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,581Chapters: 9/20Kudos: 78

Summary: Clark had died, and the world kept spinning. He wasn't quite sure where he fit now that he was back, but he knew better than to look back. Unfortunately, old habits die hard.
